title: Parent adopted out
question: Did {deceasedName} legally adopt {applicantName}’s parent ({deceasedName}’s child) out of their family (give them up for adoption)?
wholeBloodNieceOrNephewQuestion: Was this person’s parent legally adopted out of {deceasedName}’s family (given up for adoption)?

applicantParentAdoptedOut.required: Select ‘Yes’ if {applicantName}’s parent was adopted out of {deceasedName}’s family
applicantParentAdoptedOut.wholeBloodNieceOrNephewRequired: Select ‘Yes’ if this person’s parent was adopted out of {deceasedName}’s family
